items.title: Cleaner list overview
items.description: My Lists is now easier to scan with a quieter sync indicator, tighter summary card, and more compact list cards.

items.title: More room for shopping items
items.description: List details now use a slimmer header, denser item rows, and a clearer count of items left.

items.title: Streamlined add item form
items.description: The add item form now keeps quantity and notes tucked behind an optional details button so your list stays front and center.

items.title: Refined quick-add suggestions
items.description: Suggestion chips are now smaller and less distracting while staying available directly above your list.
